summary: Operators of the "Rubicon" and "Rubikon" centers conducted combat operations on March 4 and 5, 2026, targeting Ukrainian forces in the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions. On March 4, they destroyed 103 targets, including Ukrainian personnel and a 2S1 "Gvozdika" self-propelled artillery system, while also engaging in FPV air defense against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs. On March 5, they increased their tally to 128 destroyed targets, including a 2S22 "Bogdan" self-propelled howitzer, an M109, and a T-64BV tank. Additionally, a near-miss incident was reported where an FPV drone almost struck a Russian Mi-8 helicopter.
